explanations.12: The rglob('*') method recursively searches through all folders and files starting from the directory, kind of like asking 'show me everything inside this folder and all its subfolders'.
explanations.13: This checks if the file is actually a file (not a folder) AND that none of its parent folder names are in the ignored_folders set—it's our way of skipping files in .git, node_modules, etc.
explanations.14: If the file has no extension (like a README file), we give it the label 'No extension' instead of leaving it blank.
explanations.21: This removes the dot from extensions like '.py' to make them look nicer in the chart (so '.py' becomes 'PY'), but leaves non-extension labels like 'No extension' unchanged.
